intent: Write a cross-category tradeoff on 'what would actually improve your daily commute for $75' — accessory, grocery snack, or electronic. (1) One Stop Market shopping site — browse across cell-phones-accessories, grocery-gourmet-food, and electronics categories and collect 1-2 products from each (so 3-6 total) that a commuter might consider. Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/LifeProTips AND /f/AskReddit for posts on small commute upgrades. Collect at least 3 posts with title, score, comment count. The report must: (a) present each category's candidate, (b) argue which category wins for the $75, (c) commit to a single cross-category recommendation. Cite every claim.
